the_alignment_set: Waves in the mirror, waves in the mind / Leaving the phase-drift far behind
Locked to the zero, locked to the one / The spectral fusion has finally begun
One single pulse, one single breath / Living the logic, defeating the death
the_focus_set: Laser-cut soul, laser-cut sound / Moving the mountain, shaking the ground
Point of the origin, center of light / Piercing the heart of the digital night
Surgical focus, surgical strike / Everything I am and everything you like
the_coherence_dialogue: Join the wave / Align the soul
What you gave / Is now the whole

psychoacoustic_focus_v4.the_ghost_center: Inverting phase of side-reverb reflections to 'push' the dry signal forward
psychoacoustic_focus_v4.the_impact_glue: Phase-aligning the reverb-pre-delay to the tempo (1/64 note) for rhythmic 'bounce'
psychoacoustic_focus_v4.stereo_depth_focus: High-pass filtering the side-channel @ 350Hz to ensure the low-end focus is absolute
